calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Rauch and Steven Teraoka for Sumako Yamasaki.

Mr. Rauch stated that he has no authority to support his request for extraordinary fees for time spent prior to appointment, explained that he assisted Ms. Yamasaki with a real estate transaction which she entered into/signed a contract prior to obtaining services from his firm, that the Buyers were in the premises, that the Buyers threatened to sue Ms. Yamasaki, etc. In addition, Mr. Rauch stated that Ms. Jenx assisted because she spoke Japanese, that Ms. Jenx had a relationship with Ms. Yamasaki, that Ms. Jenx was billed at a lower rate, that only Ms. Jenx time was billed for telephone consulting with Co-Counsel, that three of the twelve or thirteen entries were billed by him and Mr. Teraoka, and that the fee petition was acceptable to Ms. Yamasaki. The accounting petition was taken under submission. The Court informed Counsel that it intends to reduce fees. A proposed order is to be submitted.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Continued To Dec-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
